subject: Your shortcut to more ads and maximum results
body:
Variety drives ad performance. Advantage+ creative can deliver that.

80% of consumers say that they prefer brands that offer personalised experiences, including personalised advertising.1 This means that you need to create a wide variety of ads that will resonate with individual customers.

That's why we recommend using Advantage+ creative. Think of this AI-enabled tool as your production assistant. It can take your original ad creative and generate the diverse array of images and text your campaign needs.

[See all features](https://www.facebook.com/business/ads/meta-advantage-plus/c

subject: This person is looking for you…
body:
Hey Vansh,
   I need you to stop what you are doing and read this.
   There is a very special person looking for you right now.
   They are wandering around trying to find your exact location.
   >> [1]Tap here to see exactly who is looking for you today
   While they were looking for you, they dropped something.
   They left a golden fortune cookie just for you.
   The secret message inside is not about romance.
   It actually says a giant gift is coming to you today.
   >> [2]Pick Vansh’s fortune cookie for
   6/23/2026

   May The Stars Be With You.
   Master Sarah Lee

subject: ARIA has a question for you...
body:
Hi Vansh Mittal,While you were away, something was waiting for you.
 Not just 12,000+ gyms.
 ARIA. Your personal AI fitness coach. 
 
Here's what ARIA does that no regular gym can:
Learns you, your goals, your pace. The more you train with ARIA, the smarter she gets.

Guides your training. Detailed exercise instructions, sets, reps, rest times, and everything you need. 
Builds your plan. Dynamic workout plans tailored specifically to you.

This is the world's first smart AI fitness coach, built to help you actually get there.  




Don't restart from scratch. Pic
